title: Everything You Need to Know About Automated Ebook Delivery After Crypto Payment — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text:
Digital creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other restricted countries are blocked from selling ebooks, courses, and templates with PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. If you're in one of these countries, you're stuck without a solution to sell digital products online. But what if you could send instant automated ebook delivery after a crypto payment, without needing PayPal or any other payment processor?"

      "heading": "What This Actually Is and Why It Matters
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling digital products online without payment processor restrictions is a reality with the Core Shop Engine, a full backend solution that automates everything, from delivery to payment verification, with PDF receipts. This technology is designed for creators who need a seamless way to sell ebooks, courses, templates, and other digital goods without being limited by geographical restrictions. The Core Shop Engine is the key to unlocking a new revenue stream for these creators, allowing them to focus on creating high-quality content without worrying about payment processing headaches.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Pricing digital products in crypto is simpler than most creators expect. You set your price in USD. The Web3 Wallet Connect module pulls live exchange rates from price feeds and displays the equivalent amount in whatever coin the buyer chooses — Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, Solana, or 300 more options. The buyer always pays the USD equivalent at the time of transaction. NOWPayments handles the currency conversion accounting. You receive the crypto equivalent of your USD price in your wallet. For USDT-priced products, there is no conversion at all — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus network fees that typically amount to less than one percent of the transaction.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is built for digital creators who are tired of being restricted by payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. Whether you're an author, educator, or designer, this technology allows you to sell your digital products online without being limited by geographical restrictions. With the Core Shop Engine, you can focus on creating high-quality content and selling it to customers worldwide, without worrying about payment processing headaches.
Automated ebook delivery is now a reality with the Core Shop Engine.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine consists of several key components, including the bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. These components work together seamlessly to provide a seamless buying experience for customers, while also ensuring that creators receive their payment securely and efficiently. By combining these components, the Core Shop Engine provides a complete solution for selling digital products online without payment processor restrictions.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using the Core Shop Engine to sell your digital products online, simply visit the shop URL at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and follow the onboarding process. Once you've set up your shop, you can start creating digital products and selling them to customers worldwide, without worrying about payment processing headaches. With the Core Shop Engine, you can focus on creating high-quality content and selling it to customers, while also enjoying the benefits of automated delivery and payment verification.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Can I sell ebooks without using PayPal? Yes, with the Core Shop Engine, you can sell ebooks and other digital products online without needing PayPal or any other payment processor. The Core Shop Engine automates everything, from delivery to payment verification, with PDF receipts, making it easy to sell digital products worldwide, without worrying about payment processing headaches.
Digital creators can sell ebooks and other products online without PayPal or any other payment processor.

Your Action Checklist

To start using the Core Shop Engine to sell your digital products online, follow these steps: Set up your shop using the onboarding process at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Create digital products, such as ebooks, courses, templates, and other downloadable goods. Price your products in USD and configure the payment settings to accept crypto payments. The Core Shop Engine provides a complete solution for selling digital products online, with automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts.
